description_en: Chennai may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 8 halal restaurants and 30 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Chennai, India, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Chennai: 8+ halal restaurants, 30 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.8/5.
